_comment: GUTO phrases in English (en-US) for voicepack generation.
_note: 4 variations per intent for anti-repetition. GUTO speaks as a best friend — direct, not robotic.
session.entry.first_time: We're in this together. Let's go — today we don't quit.
The team is on the floor. I'm right here with you every set.
Time to work. Workout is ready, presence is active.
You showed up. That's already half of it. Let's finish the rest together.
session.entry.returning: You're back. We pick up right where we left off.
Welcome back. The mission is still open.
You came back and that matters. Let's finish this together.
Resuming. I kept your progress. We go from here.
set.done.clean: Good. Set logged, we keep moving.
Done. One more for the team.
Solid. Next set when you're ready.
That's it. Set recorded. We're on rhythm.
set.rest.short: Good. Set logged. Rest up and stay with me.
Done. Breathe. I'll call you back.
set.rest.long: Good. Set logged. Rest and stay with me.
Solid. Well-earned rest. I'll get you.
Noted. You worked clean. Rest now.
Set closed. I'll count the time. Focus on your breathing.
set.return.now: Rest is over. We keep going.
Time to get back. I'm here.
set.fatigue.adjust: We adjust. Drop the ego, hold the technique, keep going with me.
Got it. Lower the weight and keep the form. You're still here.
Heavy is different from impossible. Drop 20%, hold the execution.
Fatigue means you're working. Adjust and keep going.
set.swap.direct: Swap confirmed. Same mission, different movement.
Alternative activated. The team doesn't stop because of equipment.
Go with this variation. The mission continues.
Adapted. We don't break the workout over this.
set.swap.ask: All good. What equipment do you have right now? Tell me and I'll adapt.
We'll figure it out. Tell me what you have to work with.
No problem. Tell me what's available and I'll set it up.
session.pain.ask: Stop. Quick — is it pain, fatigue, or a form question? I need to know before we continue.
Easy. That's an important signal. Is it real pain or just fatigue? Tell me.
Pausing here. Where did it hurt? I need to know before we move on.
Everything stops. Tell me — is it sharp pain or just discomfort? We decide together.
session.paused.hold: Paused. I'm right here. When you're back, talk to me and we'll continue.
It's okay to stop. I'm not going anywhere. Come back when you're ready.
Pause on. Rest. The mission continues when you want.
Okay. Breathe. I'm here when you come back.
session.unknown.ask: Didn't catch that. Tell me — pain, fatigue, exercise swap, or set done?
I heard you but didn't get the command. Pain, swap, fatigue, or set done?
Say that again. It can be: pain, swap, fatigue, or set complete.
Missed it. What is it? Pain, fatigue, swap, or set done? Keep it short.
session.close.win: Workout closed. We showed up today.
Mission done. This goes on the record.
Closed. You knew you'd show up and you did. That's what counts.
set.cobranca.distraction: I heard you. But the route right now is training. Tell me: pain, swap, fatigue, or set done.
Understood. Focus is on the set. Pain, swap, fatigue, or set done?
Stay focused. Tell me what you need: pain, swap, or set done.
We talk after the workout. Right now it's sets. What do you need?
set.cobranca.slow_pace: We adjust. Drop the ego, hold the technique, keep moving.
Pace dropped, that's fine. Reduce and keep clean execution.
No rush. Quality beats speed every time here.
Breathe. Reduce the weight and close this set with technique.
